headline: Get a $30 credit when you reserve Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy phones
summary: Reserve Samsung's unannounced Galaxy Z Fold phones for a $30 credit. The next Galaxy Unpacked event is set for July 22nd, 2026. The event tagline, 'A new shape unfolds,' hints at new foldable devices.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
summary: Microsoft's Xbox 'reset' involves layoffs and shifting investments. Obsidian Entertainment is now developing a new Fallout title. Multiple Obsidian projects, including Avowed, have been canceled.

headline: America’s cheapest new EV is smaller than a ping-pong table and tops out at 19mph
summary: The Fiat Topolino is America's most affordable new EV. It sacrifices size and speed, topping out at 19mph. This micromobility solution embodies tradeoffs for a low price.

headline: Cockroaches will learn to fear my SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable
summary: A SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable helps combat cockroaches. The robotic switch-flipper automates light control. It allows users to turn on lights without stepping on bugs.

headline: Dune: Part Three Trailer Event Reveals Intense Battle Sequence Screening Before The Odyssey
summary: Warner Bros. debuted the Dune: Part Three trailer at an IMAX event. The event featured a Q&A with director Denis Villeneuve and Timothée Chalamet. An extended battle sequence will screen before 'The Odyssey' IMAX showings.

headline: Save 50% Off the Flexispot XL6 Air Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair, Now Less Than $300 Shipped
summary: Get 50% off the Flexispot XL6 Air Power Lift Recliner. The massage chair is now available for under $300, shipped. It features a power lift function for ultimate comfort and ease.

headline: Dune: Part Three's New Trailer Highlights the Rift Between Paul Atreides and Chani
summary: The newest 'Dune: Part Three' trailer has been released. It emphasizes the growing tension between Paul Atreides and Chani. Fans can anticipate a dramatic relationship dynamic in the upcoming film.

headline: Obsidian Reportedly Cancels Avowed 2 to Focus on a New Fallout Game
summary: Obsidian Entertainment has reportedly canceled 'Avowed 2'. The studio will now prioritize development on a new Fallout game. This shift follows Microsoft's recent Xbox strategy changes.

headline: UK to change law so ringleader of Rochdale grooming gang can be deported
summary: The UK plans to amend the 1971 Immigration Act. This change aims to deport the Rochdale grooming gang ringleader. The Home Secretary is expected to detail the plans on Monday.

headline: Bowen: For all his bluster, Trump has no better option than talks with Iran
summary: BBC's Jeremy Bowen suggests Trump must pursue talks with Iran. The negotiating process is described as fragile. Recent US strikes highlight challenges in reaching an agreement.

headline: Farage denies stunt as Reform proposes August by-election date
summary: Nigel Farage denies his by-election call is a stunt. Reform UK proposes an August date for the by-election. Farage states it's 'only fair' the electorate judges him.

headline: Mason: Farage called by-election from weak position - and it could backfire on him
summary: Nigel Farage called a by-election from a 'weak position.' The move could potentially backfire on the Reform UK leader. Main parties are not standing, while Count Binface challenges him.
